_status: DEVELOPMENT CANDIDATE, NOT v1. The twenty tickers below are a development panel: outer-fold results were used to decide subsequent methodology changes, so their numbers measure the procedure's construction, not its performance. The name Golden Calibration v1 is earned only after the certification run described under `certification` — a fresh panel, this contract frozen, no threshold touched.
_purpose: The machine-readable definition of the feature-discovery procedure. docs/FEATURE_DISCOVERY_METHODOLOGY.md describes this file; it does not replace it. Where the two disagree, this file is the contract.

identity._why_null: A contract cannot carry the SHA of the commit that contains it: writing the SHA changes the file, which changes the commit, which changes the SHA. This file names the implementation it describes; the commit that actually ran is recorded at runtime in run_manifest.execution_head_sha, together with the sha256 of this file as it stood.
identity._why: The model space below differs from the sealed epoch's, so numbers produced under this contract must never be tabulated beside sealed ones.

run_manifest_required_fields.execution_head_sha: git HEAD at the moment the run started
run_manifest_required_fields.contract_sha256: sha256 of this file as read by the run
run_manifest_required_fields.code_dirty: whether the working tree carried uncommitted changes
run_manifest_required_fields.environment: python, platform, cpu count, thread pool settings and what the pools actually reported
run_manifest_required_fields.permutations_executed: per candidate, so an early stop is visible

data_boundary._rule: Every outer fold is carved out of Train. The OOS window is not read at any stage of discovery, selection, confirmation or the null. The single sealed OOS read remains reserved for after the methodology is frozen.

model_space._why_core: Tuning on the 45-candidate superset co-adapts the parameters to features the baseline lacks, which inflates every subsequent gain. Tuning on core and freezing gives all configurations the same protocol.

viability._rule: A configuration below the floor has not tested its features, so its gain is not evidence. The gate never ranks and never picks a winner; ranking remains marginal Train-OOF log-growth and fold-win fraction.
viability._evidence: Median out-of-fold log-growth by split-node count: 0 splits -1.4629 (0% of trials positive), 1-20 -0.6222 (22%), 21-200 +0.1789 (59%), >200 +0.3871 (84%).
viability._negative_control: Rejects 525/600 draws (88%) of the sealed v1 space and 156/600 (26%) of v2.

operating_point.cut_source: the model's predictions on its own training rows
operating_point.applied_to: confirmation and outer folds as a fixed level
operating_point._measured: The candidate's theta differs from core's in 2149 of 3600 configurations (60%), spanning the whole grid. The null must therefore reproduce theta selection inside every permutation, and it controls feature multiplicity AND operating-point multiplicity jointly.

arms.flat: 45 candidates -> discovery ranking -> single maximum -> confirmation
arms.hierarchical: 12 families -> strongest family -> its representative (one-SE plateau, simplest member) -> confirmation
arms._paired: Both arms consume the same permutations so their results are paired, but each builds its own maximum distribution and its own p-value. There is no shared threshold.

cross_fitting.role_split: one confirmation fold held out, the rest discover; the confirmation fold rotates so each inner fold serves once as untouched validation
cross_fitting._independence: Rotations are NOT independent — their discovery sets overlap. The contract says 'at least 2 rotations' and claims nothing more.

acceptance._rule: All clauses must hold simultaneously. Insufficient evidence returns nothing rather than the best of what was on offer.

max_null.null_hypothesis: Optional features carry no incremental information over the frozen core; the observed maximum gain is what searching a pool of candidates produces by itself.
max_null.mechanism: block shift of the whole optional-feature matrix within the discovery fold
max_null._why_not_label_shuffle: Permuting Y_outcome alone leaves the economic scoring reading non-permuted trade outcomes, so the null would not correspond to the statistic being tested. Shifting the optional block keeps core, labels and outcome intact, preserves feature autocorrelation and cross-correlation, and destroys only the temporal alignment between optional features and outcome.

block_length._status: rule frozen before any null result is seen; the value is measured under it
block_length.L_dependency: the first lag after which |ACF| stays inside the noise band for K consecutive lags
block_length._why_bars: The event rows are not an evenly spaced series — events cluster and their t0 gaps vary — so an autocorrelation computed over consecutive rows would measure event density as much as dependence. Dependence is measured in bar time and blocks are then mapped onto events through t0.
block_length._floor_is: H, the label horizon: two events closer than the horizon share outcome bars, so no block may be shorter than it
block_length._why_max: A fold must contain at least four blocks or the shift has too few positions to be a permutation at all
block_length.short_fold_behaviour: if max(H, L_dependency) exceeds a quarter of the fold, use the quarter and flag the rotation as block_length_clamped
block_length._measured: L_dependency in bar time: NVDA 24, MTD 14, GWW 7, AZO 9. The floor binds on all four — the label horizon outlasts the measured dependence everywhere, so L_block = 24 for the panel. This is expected rather than lucky: the label is built over 24 bars, so events closer than that share outcome bars whatever the ACF says.
block_length._sensitivity_rule: the verdict must not depend on one arbitrary block size; if L and 2L disagree for a candidate, that candidate is reported as block_sensitive and does not pass

max_null.pass_condition: b <= 4 after the full 50 permutations, where b = #{null statistic >= real statistic}; p_mc = (1+b)/51 <= 5/51
max_null.futility_bound: stop at b = 5 — even if every remaining permutation fell below the real value, p_mc >= 6/51 = 0.1176 and the candidate cannot pass
max_null.early_stop_reporting: verdict rejected_early, permutations performed, exceedances, and a LOWER BOUND on the final p-value. (1+b)/(1+n) must not be reported as a fixed-budget p-value for an early-stopped test.
max_null.scope: only rotations supporting a provisional acceptance — 42 rotations, 16 outer folds, 12 tickers
max_null._why_scoped: The null can only reject a provisional acceptance, never rescue a candidate that failed confirmation. Running it where nothing was accepted cannot change a decision.
max_null.controls: candidate-search multiplicity WITHIN a discovery rotation
max_null.does_not_control: the 42 tests run across rotations, folds and tickers
max_null._scope_statement: max-null controls candidate-search multiplicity within a discovery rotation; cross-rotation and cross-asset evidence is controlled by the stability and confirmation contract. One max-null does not control the multiplicity of the project, and must never be described as if it did.

runtime._measured: Capping the pools: 12.33 s -> 8.15 s at three workers (1.51x). Worker benchmark over eight tables: 63.90 s / 33.71 / 24.62 / 19.72 wall at jobs 1..4, core-seconds 63.88 / 65.73 / 65.96 / 67.88 — wall falls monotonically while core-seconds rise 6%, so four workers are Pareto-optimal.
runtime._reproducibility: Capping does not touch the arithmetic: stage 3 re-run on TDG reproduced [-0.09471459, -0.11062278, +0.04853174, +0.24495527] exactly.

cost_model_core_seconds_per_ticker._note: Measured before the runtime fix, at three workers with uncapped pools. Re-measure under the new configuration before budgeting a new panel.

stop_conditions.no_viable_model: if the model space cannot produce a learnable model for a window, that window reports no_viable_model and contributes nothing to feature evidence
stop_conditions.no_provisional_acceptance: if cross-fitting accepts nothing in either arm, the stage ends without the null
stop_conditions.null_rejects_all: the feature space fails the declared standard of proof; this is a result, not a failure

certification.requirement: freeze this contract and the code, select a fresh panel by a declared rule, run the whole ladder without touching thresholds, null, HPO or selection logic, and report accuracy, cost and the number of empty subsets
